## Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Reproduction Steps

1. Run `specshot ...` with these arguments: `...`
2. See error

Provide a minimal reproduction — ideally a small OpenAPI spec snippet and the exact CLI command used.

## Expected Behavior

A clear description of what you expected to happen.

## Screenshots / Logs

If applicable, paste terminal output or error logs.

```
Paste logs here
```

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04, Windows 11]
- Node.js version: [e.g. 18.18.0, 20.11.0]
- specshot version: [e.g. 1.0.0 — run `npx specshot --version`]
- Package manager: [e.g. npm 10.x]

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here.
